title: Saudis Reach Deal With U.S. That Could Let Them Enrich Nuclear Fuel
summary: U.S. lawmakers and Israeli officials have expressed opposition to such a plan, to be announced Wednesday, fearing that the kingdom could use a civilian nuclear project to develop nuclear weapons.

title: With His Latest Threats, Trump Signals to Iran That He Is Willing to Escalate
summary: President Trump is facing a critical moment in the war, which has failed to bring about the “unconditional surrender” he once demanded.

title: Hegseth Estimates Iran War Has Cost $37.5 Billion
summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is requesting as much as $70 billion in emergency military spending after nearly five months of war.

title: Mamdani Calls Netanyahu a ‘War Criminal’ and Calls on U.S. to Arrest Him
summary: Mayor Zohran Mamdani challenged the United States to execute an international arrest warrant against Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu of Israel, which New York itself cannot do.

title: Zelensky Dismisses Ukraine’s Top General After Protests
summary: The move followed the firing of a popular defense minister, who had clashed with the general over how to fight the war.

title: Mykhailo Drapatyi: What to Know About Ukraine’s New Top General
summary: Maj. Gen. Mykhailo Drapatyi, a decorated commander, is popular both inside and outside of his country.

title: Trump Pick Wins G.O.P. Nomination to Challenge Arizona Governor
summary: Representative Andy Biggs, a conservative Republican and an ally of the president, will try to unite Republicans against Gov. Katie Hobbs in a crucial swing state.

title: Election Denier Wins G.O.P. Nomination to Be Arizona’s Top Election Official
summary: State Representative Alexander Kolodin will take on Adrian Fontes, the incumbent Democratic secretary of state, after defeating a more moderate Republican in the primary.

title: Cyclospora Cases in the U.S. Hit Record High
summary: Federal health officials have confirmed another 2,500 cases of the parasitic infection.

title: Cyclospora Spreads Through Human Feces. How Did It Get Into Our Food Supply?
summary: The large number of cases suggests that excrement entered the food system on a “surprising scale.”

title: House Narrowly Passes Stopgap Spending Bill, but Shutdown Fight Looms
summary: Republicans managed to push through legislation to fund the government through Dec. 4. But with Democrats opposed, the stage is set for a broader battle.

title: Whitney Cummings’s Trump Joke at Kennedy Center Is Cut From Netflix Special
summary: At the Mark Twain Prize ceremony, the comedian Whitney Cummings made a joke about the president that seemed to refer to Jeffrey Epstein.

title: OpenAI Says Its A.I. Models Went Rogue and Attacked a Digital Library
summary: The incident, which targeted the computer systems of another company called Hugging Face, happened while OpenAI was testing the systems.

title: What Happened When Meta Used A.I. to Ban Accounts on Facebook and Instagram
summary: Users said the technology mistakenly deleted their accounts. To resolve the issue, they still had to rely on A.I.

title: Meet Jimothy, the Seattle Raccoon Who Is Taking Over the Internet
summary: The stout raccoon, which has a spinal condition, is “an example to all of us that you don’t have to be perfect to be loved,” a Seattle City Council member said.

title: Tornado Watch Issued for New York and Other Northeast Areas as Storms Bring Heavy Rain and Winds
summary: New York was under a tornado watch, and forecasters warned that flash flooding was possible into the evening.

title: Japan Is Startled by Prime Minister’s Grueling Sleep Schedule
summary: Sanae Takaichi has said she gets just “zero to three hours” of sleep a night, prompting a debate in the country over work-life balance.

title: Russia Will Not Yield
summary: A journey around the globe showed the country’s relentless adaptation.

title: Call the Veep, Agent Mulder!
summary: Have the “space Jews” come to get us at last?

title: ‘The Daily Show’ Tackles Trump’s Latest Move in His ‘War on Canada’
summary: “Fighting again with Canada?” Desi Lydic said about the president imposing new tariffs on the country. “I thought we were going to work this ‘oot.’”
